name: express-api
description: Express.js REST API with ES modules

files.content:
# Stage 1: Install production dependencies
FROM node:20-alpine AS deps
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --omit=dev

# Stage 2: Production image
FROM node:20-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY package*.json ./
COPY src ./src
EXPOSE {port}
CMD ["node", "src/index.js"]

version: '3.8'

services:
  app:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "{port}:{port}"
    environment:
      - PORT={port}
      - MONGO_URL=mongodb://db:27017/{projectName}
    depends_on:
      - db
    restart: unless-stopped

  db:
    image: mongo:7
    volumes:
      - mongo_data:/data/db
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  mongo_data:

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "Installing dependencies..."
npm ci

echo "Running unit and integration tests..."
node --test unit_tests/ API_tests/

echo "All tests passed."

# {projectName}

A production-ready REST API built with Express 4 and Node.js 20.

## Tech Stack

- **Runtime:** Node.js 20 (Alpine)
- **Framework:** Express 4
- **Database:** MongoDB 7 (via Docker)
- **Testing:** Node.js built-in test runner (`node:test`)

## Quick Start (Docker)

```bash
docker compose up --build
```

The API will be available at `http://<HOST>:{port}`.

## Manual Setup

```bash
npm ci
npm run dev
```

## API Endpoints

| Method | Path         | Description           |
|--------|--------------|-----------------------|
| GET    | /health      | Health check          |
| GET    | /api         | Welcome message       |
| GET    | /api/users   | List all users        |

## Running Tests

```bash
# Via script
bash run_tests.sh

# Manual
npm ci
node --test unit_tests/ API_tests/
```

## Project Structure

```
{projectName}/
├── src/
│   ├── index.js            # Entry point
│   ├── routes/index.js     # API routes
│   ├── middleware/          # Express middleware
│   ├── controllers/        # Route controllers
│   └── models/             # Data models
├── unit_tests/             # Unit tests
├── API_tests/              # Integration tests
├── Dockerfile              # Multi-stage Docker build
├── docker-compose.yml      # Docker Compose orchestration
├── run_tests.sh            # Test runner script
└── package.json
```
